Forced to Eat Mango as a Frontend Engineer
Forced to Eat Mango (27): Setting Up MongoDB Atlas Step by Step

Next up, let me walk you through MongoDB Atlas. This post also records how to sign up for MongoDB Atlas — from creating your account to deploying a free cloud database and setting up your user and IP access.
Forced to Eat Mango (14): Updating Documents with Mongoose

We've covered query syntax already, so now it's time to look at updates. Mongoose's update syntax is a little different from raw MongoDB, but honestly it's not hard at all. In this post I'll walk through updateOne, findOneAndUpdate, that handy new option, and why I personally reach for findOneAndUpdate most of the time.
Forced to Eat Mango (3): MongoDB CRUD — the Create Part

Now that we've gotten comfortable with the basic MongoDB operations, the next obvious step is CRUD. We're still going to be poking around in the terminal, so fire it up and let's get into the Create part — insertOne and insertMany.
